faq.pageDescription: Find answers to common questions about Cold Flyer products, services, and policies.
faq.heroSub: Find answers to common questions about our products, services, and policies.
faq.getAQuoteDesc: Request a customized quote for your project
faq.trackOrderDesc: Check the status of your shipment
faq.technicalSupportDesc: Get help with installation and maintenance

contactInfo.title: Still Have Questions?
contactInfo.sub: Our support team is ready to help you.

questions.q: What types of AC systems do you offer?
questions.a: We offer a comprehensive range of air conditioning solutions including split ACs, window ACs, cassette ACs, ducted ACs, portable ACs, and VRF systems. We carry top brands like Samsung, LG, Daikin, Gree, Carrier, Mitsubishi, and more.

Yes, we provide professional installation services through our certified network of HVAC technicians across all 64 districts of Bangladesh. Our team handles everything from single-unit residential installations to large-scale commercial projects.
We partner with leading global and local brands including Samsung, LG, Daikin, Gree, Carrier, Mitsubishi, General, Sharp, Walton, and Vision. Our selection ensures quality options for every budget.

questions.q: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.a: We accept bKash, Nagad, Rocket, all major credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and cash on delivery for eligible orders. All transactions are secured with industry-standard encryption.

questions.q: Do you offer EMI or installment options?
questions.a: Yes, we offer 0% EMI options through partner banks and mobile financial services (bKash, Nagad). EMI plans are available for orders above BDT ২০,০০০. Contact our sales team for more details.
Delivery within Dhaka city takes 24-48 hours. For other districts, delivery takes 3-7 business days depending on your location. Heavy equipment may require additional handling time.
Yes, we deliver to all 64 districts of Bangladesh. Delivery charges vary by location and are calculated at checkout. We have partner logistics networks throughout the country.
We offer a 7-day return policy for defective or damaged products. Custom orders and installed items are not returnable. Contact our support team within 24 hours of delivery to initiate a return.

All products include manufacturer warranties. AC units typically carry 3-5 years compressor warranty and 1 year on parts. Extended warranties are available at purchase. Register your product online for warranty coverage.

questions.q: How do I create an account?
questions.a: Click 'Sign Up' in the top navigation and complete the registration form with your name, email, and phone number. Creating an account gives you access to order tracking, order history, and exclusive offers.
You can reach our support team via email at support@coldflyer.com, call us at 09612-345678, or use the live chat feature on our website. We're available Saturday-Thursday, 9AM-8PM. Friday closed.

questions.q: Do you provide AC gas refill services?
questions.a: Yes, we provide AC gas refill services using genuine R-32 and R-410A refrigerants. Our technicians check for leaks before refilling and ensure optimal pressure levels for maximum cooling efficiency.
